extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer is claiming a crack on the rear bumper of their car.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows the rear of a black car with extensive damage to the rear bumper, including cracks and material loss.
The image shows the rear of a white car with severe damage to the rear bumper, including dents and a large tear. A watermark is visible on the image.

result.user_claim: Customer: Rear bumper crack on my car. | Support: What exact part should be reviewed? | Customer: The rear bumper. | Support: Is any other damage part of this claim? | Customer: No, rear bumper crack only.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed rear_bumper with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed rear_bumper with visible crack. Supporting images: img_1;img_2.
